title: Universe expansion rate — predicted vs. measured (km/s per megaparsec)
notes: Illustrative; CMB early-universe prediction from Planck 2018 (H0=67.4). Direct measurement from SH0ES/Cepheid ladder confirmed with JWST calibration (H0≈73). The ~5-unit gap — the Hubble Tension — remains unexplained and may require new physics.
